# Anusha Jeyaseelan Portfolio

This GitHub Pages portfolio presents selected case studies in content workflow architecture, developer documentation, metadata models, validation/readiness standards, AI-assisted authoring, and technical enablement.

Primary focus areas:

- Content workflow architecture for developer platforms
- Metadata, taxonomy, validation, and readiness models
- Docs-as-code and CI/CD publishing workflows
- API, SDK, and executable developer documentation
- AI/LLM content systems and prompt/template design
- OpenUSD and Omniverse learning projects for digital twin content workflows

Live site: https://anushjeya.github.io/anusha-jeyaseelan/
